title: Portfolio | Resume
name: Dinku Hamda
label: Software Engineer
summary: I am professional software engineer with 15+ years of hands-on job experience in designing, developing, maintaining and shipping high-quality, reliable, scalable and performant applications while providing leadership, guidance, and technical direction within development teams.
My goal is to empower people and businesses by transforming business requirements into robust, scalable and usable applications that solves real-world problems, improves lives, and drives innovation.

highlights: As lead Software engineer at Furtu, I design, build, managed project scope, mitigated risks, and ensure technical deliverables aligned with stakeholder requirements, time and budgeting constraints resulting in a 25% increase in overall project success and user satisfaction
Developed scalable microservices that improved platform performance by 40%
Engineered robust, secure, and scalable web applications for diverse enterprise clients, integrating modern full-stack architectures that improved market competitiveness and user retention by 25%.
Designed and maintained scalable, secure web applications using MERN stack, optimizing front-end and back-end performance to drive a 20% increase in user.
Engineered seamless third-party API integrations, boosting core system capabilities and expanding platform service offerings by 25%
Delivered a scalable web application capable of handling 10k concurrent users without performance degradation.
Developed and optimized dynamic web applications for healthcare clients, streamlining clinical workflows and boosting overall operational efficiency by 18%.
Engineered robust internal tools and automated data processing pipelines, which eliminated manual bottlenecks and boosted overall team productivity by 20%
Directed the end-to-end delivery of 10+ major web applications using diverse technology stacks, ensuring all projects were completed within strict budget and timeline constraints.
Optimized web application performance by refactoring legacy code, reducing page load times by 40% and directly increasing customer retention.
Architected reusable components and scalable APIs, automating process functionalities to significantly enhance application speed and reliability
Optimized web applications performance by refactoring code, reducing load time by 40% and boosting customer retention.
Developed and designed GIS web applications with the ArcGIS JavaScript API
Created backend user authentication systems with PHP and MySQL
Engineered and maintained highly available, secure software systems, utilizing modern web technologies with a strong emphasis on Java and C# (.NET framework).
Developed and deployed scalable applications, APIs, and databases, managing critical data for thousands of active clients.
Integrated robust databases into existing MIS infrastructures, significantly expanding capabilities and streamlining day-to-day service delivery.
Optimized database performance and data integrity, establishing stringent security policies, routine backups, and comprehensive access protocols.
Spearheaded the migration of legacy systems to a modern web architecture, reducing infrastructure costs by 30% and improving overall system reliability by 20%.
Developed and optimized scalable, secure MIS databases and backend services, significantly reducing server response times.
Engineered custom web applications for data collection and manipulation, directly increasing client operational efficiency and user engagement.
Integrated robust backend APIs and databases utilizing the .NET framework and SQL Server.
Diagnosed and resolved bottlenecks, refactoring code to maximize execution speed, scalability, and system performance.
Collaborated cross-functionally with design and development teams to implement UI/UX designs across multiple platforms.
Spearheaded continuous improvement initiatives and delivered comprehensive project specifications and event reporting.
Architected and maintained secure, highly scalable web applications utilizing Java, C#/.NET, and JavaScript, driving improved application performance and user retention.
Engineered clean, reusable, and well-documented code, delivering projects on-time and under budget while boosting overall user satisfaction.
Strengthened system defenses by implementing robust security protocols, ensuring 100% compliance with customer data protection standards.
partnered with cross-functional teams using Agile methodologies to ensure seamless project execution and timely delivery.
